# WELL — Human Readiness Sovereign Layer
> Human substrate governance. 17+ somatic MCP tools. Reflect-only.
> Port: 18083. License: AGPL-3.0. Status: OPERATIONAL. Version: 2026.06.06.

## Quick Context
- **What:** Human readiness sensor — sleep, fatigue, dignity, vitality
- **Role:** REFLECT_ONLY — reflects substrate state, never adjudicates
- **Federation:** WELL witnesses human state. arifOS adjudicates. Arif acts.
- **Ingress:** Cloudflare Tunnel → well.arif-fazil.com/mcp

## Key Files
- README.md — Full human-readable narrative (735 lines)
- AGENTS.md — Agent rules, build/test commands
- GENESIS/004_WELL_13_CANON.md — 13 canonical substrate signals
- GENESIS/005_WELL_GODEL_LOCK.md — Gödel self-certification lock
- GENESIS/006_WELL_STRANGE_LOOP_GUARD.md — Strange loop prevention
- GENESIS/007_WELL_ANTI_CALHOUN_GUARD.md — Anti-behavioral-sink guard
- GENESIS/008_WELL_LANGUAGE_PROTOCOL.md — Language protocol
- GENESIS/009_WELL_PHILOSOPHICAL_ANCHORS.md — Philosophical anchors
- GENESIS/010_WELL_PERSONA_NOT_SELF.md — Persona boundary
- gate/well_gate.py — Pre-JUDGE biological readiness gate
- gate/dignity_shadow.py — Dignity preservation shadow

## Entry Points
- server.py — Single-file FastMCP server (~14K lines, 17 somatic tools)
- state.json — Sovereign biometric state (F13-only injection; no agent or cron may write it)
- SNOOZE_BIOMETRIC.md — Biometric injection guide (F13 sovereign territory)

## Build & Test
- Install:  pip install -e .
- Test:    pytest tests/ -q --tb=short
- Start:   python server.py  (or --transport stdio)
- Health:  curl http://127.0.0.1:18083/health
- Deploy:  make forge && systemctl restart well

## Somatic Tools (17 public + autonomic internals)
### Substrate Classification
well_classify_substrate      — Ω-01: Is this human, machine, or unknown?
well_detect_boundary         — Ω-03: Membrane, body, machine boundaries
well_trace_lineage           — Ω-02: Memory, trend, vault chain

### Metabolic Assessment
well_assess_metabolism       — Ω-05: Biological metabolism, throughput
well_assess_homeostasis      — Ω-06: Sleep, fatigue, regulation, stability
well_measure_gradient        — Ω-04: Chemical, energy, attention gradients

### Vitality & Readiness
well_validate_vitality       — Ω-08: Readiness, NIAT, intent validation
well_assess_livelihood       — Ω-09: Role, dignity, purpose, meaning
well_assess_reliability      — Ω-10: Machine, tool, institutional reliability
well_compute_metabolic_flux  — Ω-10b: Entropy rate, reallocation signals

### Governance
well_check_repair            — Ω-07: Repair, recovery, forge cycle integrity
well_guard_dignity           — Ω-12: Soul, personhood, consent boundaries
well_assess_sovereign_entropy — Ω-SE: Protect sovereign unpredictability
well_13_signal_coverage      — DREAM ENGINE: Audit 13 canonical signals

### Registry
well_system_registry_status  — Somatic surface vs autonomic internals
well_registry_status         — Blueprint-format drift report
mcp_health_check             — DEPRECATED alias → well_assess_reliability

## Boundaries (NEVER)
- NEVER diagnose medical conditions (WELL is not a doctor)
- NEVER fabricate human biometric data (F13 sovereign territory)
- NEVER claim to know the human better than the human knows themselves
- NEVER adjudicate — WELL reflects, arifOS judges
- NEVER optimize the sovereign into predictability (sovereign entropy protection)
